quality_cost: 100 public samples per split; DDIM step30; runtime mainline plus unified artifact threshold replay; cuda runtime

finite_tail.interpretation: Finite public-100 target split; strict-tail values are count-level empirical gates, not continuous sub-percent calibration.

boundary.summary: controlled / public-subset / proxy-shadow-member / risk-exists; TPR@0.1%FPR is a zero-false-positive empirical tail on 100 target nonmembers; not a final exploit, paper-complete reproduction, or full real-world benchmark
allowed_claims: verified black-box privacy-risk signal on a controlled public-100 packet
all four headline metrics come from one upstream-threshold metric source
nonzero strict-tail signal with explicit finite-sample caveat
